rationale: Both notes indicate a close conceptual link: the citing paper centers on how a “free” acquisition format affects flat-rate/pay-per-use usage and retention, while the cited paper models how free allowances in tariff structures change usage beyond standard price effects. Given this overlap in focal constructs (free offers, tariff/usage behavior in subscription telecom contexts), the citation is plausibly a substantive theory/mechanism source rather than an obvious incidental mention, even though the matched evidence is only DOI-level.
